---
title: "Students"
---

## Graduate Student Supervision

I supervise graduate students in geostatistics, deep learning and geological modeling. My active research areas are stochastic hydrogeology, geotechnics and geothermal energy.

## Current Opportunities

I am open to new applications (B.Eng., M.Eng., M.Sc.A. and Ph.D.) for research projects in multivariate non-Gaussian geostatistics, development of geostatistical algorithms for inverse problems, deep learning for geological modeling, inverse problems in hydrogeology, and stochastic simulation of fracture networks.

[{{< fa envelope >}} Contact me](mailto:dany.lauzon@polymtl.ca){.btn .btn-primary}

## Current Students

*Click a name to show the details. Tags: [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} lead supervisor · [(Co-supervisor)]{.role-tag} co-supervisor.*

### Doctoral (Ph.D.)

::: {.student}
**Kassahun Aweke Arega** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Geostatistical approach for modeling groundwater recharge in Abitibi–Témiscamingue

::: {.student-more}
Ph.D. in Mineral Engineering (Polytechnique Montréal) · Supervisor · Start: September 2025\
**Funding:** PAR Scholarship (Geological Survey of Canada)\
**Co-supervisor:** [Nicolas Benoît](https://profils-profiles.science.gc.ca/en/profile/nicolas-benoit)
:::
:::

::: {.student}
**Innocent Boris Tagne Nkounga** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Automation of subsurface modeling using geostatistics for geotechnical applications

::: {.student-more}
Ph.D. in Mineral Engineering (Polytechnique Montréal) · Supervisor · Start: January 2025
:::
:::

### Master's (M.Sc.A.)

::: {.student}
**Olivier Brisebois** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Statistical inference and modeling of water inflows for characterizing apparent hydraulic conductivity in standpipe wells

::: {.student-more}
Master's in Mineral Engineering (Polytechnique Montréal) · Supervisor · Start: September 2024\
**Funding:** NSERC Scholarship (CGS M)\
**Co-supervisor:** [Philippe Pasquier](https://www.polymtl.ca/expertises/pasquier-philippe)
:::
:::

### Master's Internship (MS)

::: {.student}
**Meriam Zaghdoud Mouihbi** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Development of automated tools for stochastic geological modeling of soil–groundwater physical interactions in a geotechnical-environmental context

::: {.student-more}
Master's in Applied Geology for the Environment (University of Tunis El Manar) · Supervisor\
**Funding:** Mitacs Globalink Research Internship\
**Co-supervisor:** [Amina Mabrouk El Asmi](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3255-369X)
:::
:::

### Research Internship

::: {.student}
**Shreya Kumar** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Geostatistical Methods for Complex Earth Patterns: Internship in Data Analysis

::: {.student-more}
Research internship · Supervisor\
Main tasks: geostatistical analysis
:::
:::

::: {.student}
**Iqra Arshad Mehmood** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Development of Automated Stochastic Geological Modeling Tools Specifically Adapted to the Requirements of Geotechnical Engineering

::: {.student-more}
Research internship · Supervisor
:::
:::

### Undergraduate (B.Eng.)

::: {.student}
**Gabriel Tabash** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Field and laboratory hydrogeological characterization of a natural cover for tailings storage facility restoration

::: {.student-more}
Bachelor in Geological Engineering (Polytechnique Montréal) · Supervisor · Start: September 2026\
**Funding:** NSERC Scholarship (USRA) + FRQNT Supplement (BPCA)\
**Co-supervisor:** [Karine Sylvain](https://www.linkedin.com/in/karine-sylvain-13815b147/?originalSubdomain=ca)
:::
:::

::: {.student}
**Xavier Thibeault** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Automation of geotechnical data processing for automated modeling (ArchPy software)

::: {.student-more}
Bachelor in Geological Engineering (Polytechnique Montréal) · Supervisor · Start: September 2026\
**Funding:** NSERC Scholarship (USRA) + FRQNT Supplement (BPCA)
:::
:::

::: {.student}
**Loris Pensa** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Surrogate modeling of hydrogeological systems using DeepONet

::: {.student-more}
Bachelor in Computer Engineering (Polytech Nice Sophia — Université Côte d'Azur) · Supervisor · Start: June 2026\
**Funding:** OPCO Scholarship
:::
:::

::: {.student}
**Maud Marconcini** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Optical character recognition (OCR) and machine learning for enrichment and standardization of a geotechnical database

::: {.student-more}
Bachelor in Computer Engineering (Polytech Nice Sophia — Université Côte d'Azur) · Supervisor · Start: June 2026
:::
:::

::: {.student}
**Mohamed Hfaithia** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Analysis of the influence of fracture network non-stationarity on flow in mining environments

::: {.student-more}
Chemical and Mining Engineering (ENIGA — National School of Engineers of Gafsa) · Supervisor\
**Funding:** Mitacs Globalink Research Internship\
**Co-supervisor:** [Pedro Cacciari](https://www.polymtl.ca/expertises/cacciari-pedro)
:::
:::

::: {.student}
**Seonghoon Park** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Automated extraction of drilling data from PDF reports using OCR technology

::: {.student-more}
Bachelor in Computer Engineering (Pohang University of Science and Technology — POSTECH) · Supervisor · Start: February 2026
:::
:::

::: {.student}
**Balthazar Desrez** [(Supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Development of a database of stochastic hydrogeological models to train surrogate models using autoencoders

::: {.student-more}
Bachelor in Geological Engineering (Polytechnique Montréal) · Supervisor · Start: September 2025\
**Funding:** Polytechnique Montréal UPIR Program
:::
:::

## Graduated Students

::: {.student}
**Éric Delabrouille** [(Co-supervisor)]{.role-tag} — Study of the Sharpe ratio as an optimization metric for mineral resource estimation

::: {.student-more}
Master's in Software and Computer Engineering (Polytechnique Montréal) · Co-supervisor · Graduated: June 2026\
**Funding:** Mitacs Accelerate (Orano Mining)
:::
:::

## Desired Profile

I look for a strong background in geological engineering, mining engineering, applied mathematics or Earth sciences; solid foundations in mathematics and statistics; programming experience (Python, MATLAB or similar); and curiosity, autonomy and an interest in fundamental and applied research. Knowledge of geostatistics and artificial intelligence is an asset.

## Application Process

To apply, email me a cover letter (1 page), a detailed CV with your academic results, your transcripts (unofficial accepted), two letters of recommendation (may follow), and work samples if available.

[{{< fa envelope >}} dany.lauzon@polymtl.ca](mailto:dany.lauzon@polymtl.ca){.btn .btn-primary}

## Funding

Students are encouraged to apply for external scholarships (NSERC, FRQNT, Vanier, Polytechnique Montréal). I can provide additional financial support through my research grants.
